patch.value: Reusable external npm package ecosystem smoke harness

Follow-up from pm-lwtx ecosystem lane: external audit manually discovered npm packages with npm search 'pm-cli pm-package' and verified isolated install + package doctor + runtime availability for 15 current packages. Duplicate check: pm search external npm package smoke harness discover pm-cli pm-package install doctor availability found only closed broad-audit/package-first lineage (pm-59gj, pm-kd9n, pm-etxf) and no open direct harness item. Desired outcome: script or npm task that discovers current external pm-cli/pm-package packages and runs isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH install, package doctor, and contracts availability probes with compact JSON output for agents.
